name: calcolatori
postCreateCommand: sed -i 's/\r//' ~/CE/bin/scarica-esame && sed -i 's/socket,path=debug\/.gdb-socket,server=on,wait=off/socket,host=127.0.0.1,port=1234,server=on,wait=off/' ~/CE/bin/boot && sed -i 's|if ! \[ -e debug/.gdb-socket \];|if false;|' ~/CE/bin/debug && sed -i 's|target remote debug/.gdb-socket|target remote 127.0.0.1:1234|' ~/CE/bin/debug
